demoHome.title: Indonesian Supplier Directory

demoHome.verifiedDesc: Rigorous verification of legal credentials, factory sites, and export capabilities.
demoHome.rfqDesc: Submit quote requests to multiple suppliers in one click. Receive responses within 24h.

demoHome.footerDesc: The premier B2B marketplace platform connecting verified suppliers and business buyers across Indonesia.
